headline: Equifax (EFX) Valuation Check After Share Price Pullback And Earnings Growth Narrative
summary: Equifax stock performance snapshot Equifax (EFX) has drawn investor attention after a period where the stock is down 8.2% over the past month and 16.9% over the past 3 months, with year to date returns down 23.4%. See our latest analysis for Equifax. At a share price of US$164.04, Equifax’s short term share price momentum has cooled, with the 30 day share price return down 8.2% and the year to date share price return down 23.4%, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down 36.8%.
